rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow the user to select an amount to withdraw from a list of options.
The system shall permit the user to enter a custom value if they want a different amount.
The system shall verify the transaction after the user enters an amount.
The system shall allow the user to re-enter the amount if the transaction is rejected.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The user selects an amount to withdraw from a list of options.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: In an ATM, the user first selects an amount to withdraw.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the user wants a different amount, they can enter a custom value.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If they want a different amount, they can choose to enter a custom value instead.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system verifies the transaction after the user enters an amount.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After entering the amount, the system proceeds to verify the transaction.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the transaction is rejected, the user can re-enter the amount.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the transaction is rejected, the user is taken back to enter the amount again.
